case_title: IVANOV, ALEXANDR et al VS SHUKHAT, HELEN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,183.00 FILED BY IVANOV, ALEXANDR NAZAROVA, YULIYA DRISKILL, LISA DRISKILL, DARREN POLYAKOVA, ASYA AS TO DEFENDANT SHUKHAT, HELEN SHUKHAT, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
